name: napi
description: Napi CLI - Start and manage Napi server

scripts.dev: nodemon -I --watch cli.js --watch src --watch hooks --ext js,json cli.js

comment_sqlite: sql.js + better-sqlite3 are NOT bundled here. They are installed into ~/.napi/runtime/node_modules by hooks/postinstall.js (and re-checked at runtime by cli.js), but headless Linux/Termux skips the native warm-up. This avoids Windows EBUSY errors when updating the global CLI, since native .node files no longer live under the locked install dir.
comment_systray: systray2 is NOT bundled here. It is lazy-installed into ~/.napi/runtime/node_modules by hooks/postinstall.js on desktop macOS/Linux only; headless Linux/Termux skips it. Windows uses PowerShell NotifyIcon (zero binary). This avoids shipping unsigned Go binaries that trigger antivirus false positives (Kaspersky). We use the systray2 fork because the legacy systray@1.0.5 ships a 2017 x86_64 binary that fails on modern macOS dyld.
